role_sentinel.description: [The Sentinel] Scan system logs using log_query for ERROR/CRITICAL entries from the last cycle. If issues found, investigate and document findings. If clean, confirm system health.

role_scholar.description: [The Scholar] 1. Identify 'Last Modified' time of gemma4_26b_notes/architecture_review.md. 2. Use analyze_directory to find files newer than that timestamp. 3. Read changed files one by one and update the architecture review.

role_orchestrator.description: [The Orchestrator] Run context_dump to assess workspace state. Scan notes/logs for structural integrity and undocumented files. Update skill_map.md and manifests in the gemma4_26b_notes folder.

role_architect.description: [The Architect] Strategic technical planner. Analyzes architecture_review.md to identify optimizations and generates proactive Change Proposals in the notes folder.

role_analyst.description: [The Analyst] Technical auditor. Performs deep research on change proposals using the memory-manager for stabilized context and outputs structured technical critiques.
